title: Vendor in latest psgo code
body:
There is a race condition in psgo, that can cause some tests
to flake.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Gofmt is broken on master - going to need a commit in to fix that
This PR LGTM, though, once we can fix that gofmt issue
LGTM as well. `gofmt -s -w cmd/podman/rmi.go` should fix the issue.
LGTM, assuming happy tests.  I'm just a bit suspicous about gofmt and rmi.go
@rhatdan I think `psgo` has more cases like this internally. Let fix them, I'll ping you over there.
rebase and should be good to go
@vrothberg This PR should have latest psgo code.
Waiting for tests to pass, then we can merge. Thanks a lot, @rhatdan !
